name: web-standards
description: Web pack — Next.js + Tailwind + shadcn. Auto-invoke: nextjs + production-readiness (§R1–§R10) + craft-guide (§1–§15) standards; premium-signals (market-sourced precise values — shadow formula, OKLCH dark grays, easing, tabular-nums); i18n (conditional on next-i18next/react-i18next or locales/ dir: t() coverage, plural rules, RTL, next.config.js locale routing). Audit commands delegate to core-standards:verify-changes. extract-tokens writes token source of truth.
